TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit ColorExtensions extends System.Object

Docs.summary: Extension methods for converting between and SkiaSharp color types.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`ColorExtensions` provides extension methods for converting color values between the HarfBuzzSharp and SkiaSharp color types.
Note that <xref:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor> stores color components as individual bytes (Red, Green, Blue, Alpha) with no specific packed byte order, whereas <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColor> stores color as a packed `0xAARRGGBB` `uint`. The conversion methods correctly map the individual byte channels.
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorF> uses normalized floating-point channels in the range 0.0–1.0. Converting from `HBColor` divides each channel by 255; converting to `HBColor` clamps and rounds to the nearest byte.

MemberSignature.Value: public static HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor (this SkiaSharp.SKColor color);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor color) cil managed

Docs.returns: An with the same red, green, blue, and alpha channel values as .

MemberSignature.Value: public static HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor (this SkiaSharp.SKColorF color);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor ToHBColor(valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF color) cil managed

Docs.param: The to convert. Each channel value is multiplied by 255 and rounded to the nearest byte.
Docs.summary: Converts an to an , clamping each channel to the 0–255 range.
Docs.returns: An with each channel clamped and rounded from the normalized floating-point values of .

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor ToSKColor (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor ToSKColor(valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor) cil managed

Docs.returns: An with the same red, green, blue, and alpha channel values as .

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorF ToSKColorF (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorF ToSKColorF(valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor hbColor) cil managed

Docs.param: The to convert. Each byte channel is divided by 255 to produce a value in the range 0.0–1.0.
Docs.summary: Converts an to an with normalized floating-point channels.
Docs.returns: An with each channel normalized to the range 0.0–1.0.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKColor[] ToSKColors (this HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor[] hbColors);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColor[] ToSKColors(valuetype HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor[] hbColors) cil managed

Docs.param: The array of values to convert.
Docs.summary: Converts an array of values to an array of values.
Docs.returns: An array of values corresponding to the input array, or if is .
